title: After the Betrayal
location: In the bitter aftermath of the raid against the Red Noodle Clan
situation: The GRATS have stolen the Planet Weapons from the Red Noodle Clan. Manus fought in the clash wielding the Sword of Yindao and the Chitsu Nunchucks against the RNC. The victory is real, but the wound beneath it is deeper. The Red Noodle Clan is furious, and Koden Bushi Bloodflower has vowed fury in return.
knows: The GRATS stole the Planet Weapons from the Red Noodle Clan
He wielded the Sword of Yindao in the conflict
He wielded the Chitsu Nunchucks in the conflict
He knows of the Nine Planet Weapons
The Red Noodle Clan is furious
He is a skilled warrior and musician from Borinquen Island
He carries the experience of war, loyalty, and consequence more heavily now
